sections.title: Negotiation / Rebuttal Support
sections.body:
Please review the following operations and provide support if they are part of the intended repair plan:
- Structural Measurement Verification: Please provide the documented dimensional measurement or verification support for this repair path, including how geometry confirmation was performed.
- Hidden Mounting Geometry / Teardown Growth: Please provide the supporting rationale or documentation for this item: Teardown growth or hidden mounting-geometry burden appears supportable here, but that front-end scope is not fully reflected in the current estimate.
- Four-Wheel Alignment: Please provide the alignment rationale and any related post-repair documentation supporting this operation.
- ADAS / Calibration Procedure Support: Please provide the required ADAS, scan, and calibration procedure support for this repair path, including the expected verification steps.

sections.title: Editable Email Body
sections.body:
Hello,

After reviewing the current file, our position is that documented file facts show vehicle 2018 Tesla Model S 75D AWD, insurer GEICO, mileage 173,702, and estimate total $19,428.53. The visible scope centers on front damage, front-end areas, and 1 noted panel. It already documents strengths such as procedure research/documentation, work authorization, test fits, refrigerant service, and headlamp/fog aim. Bottom line: credible preliminary estimate, but still likely to grow after teardown. The clearest remaining issues are structural measurement verification, hidden mounting geometry / teardown growth, four-wheel alignment, and adas / calibration procedure support.

The main items that still need revision or support are:
- Structural Measurement Verification: Dimensional verification and measuring support are not clearly documented for the current repair path.
- Hidden Mounting Geometry / Teardown Growth: Teardown growth or hidden mounting-geometry burden appears supportable here, but that front-end scope is not fully reflected in the current estimate.
- Four-Wheel Alignment: Alignment appears supportable for this repair path, but that operation is not clearly documented in the current estimate.
- ADAS / Calibration Procedure Support: Add and document Tesla-specific calibration confirmation beyond scan/reset language.

Please update the estimate or provide the documentation supporting the current position on the items above.

Thank you,
[Your Name]
[Title / Shop]
[Phone / Email]
